Title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
Actors: Stephen Colbert, Stay Human, Jon Batiste
Plot: Stephen Colbert took over as host, executive producer and writer of THE LATE SHOW on Tuesday, Sept. 8, 2015. The comedy-variety-talk show is broadcast four nights a week from the Ed Sullivan theatre in New York.
Awards: Won 2 Primetime Emmys. 7 wins & 111 nominations total
